title: Checkdiff and direct MWCC validation
description: Run harness-backed checkdiff, summary diff, and direct MWCC translation-unit compile checks against a target Melee checkout.
status_message: Harness bridge v1: APIs delegate to reference/melee-harness-master/tools/checkdiff.py and ninja_compile.py with MELEE_ROOT bound to the selected project checkout.
limitations: Requires a built Melee checkout with build/GALE01/report.json, build.ninja, target objects, objdiff-cli, wibo, and MWCC compiler artifacts.
checkdiff may run fix_includes.py before compiling, so use it only when source edits are allowed for the target checkout.
Direct compile reports compiler viability for a translation unit; objdiff/checkdiff is still needed to prove a source change improved the target.

usage.agent_guidance: Use as part of attempt evaluation when a concrete source edit needs compile/checkdiff feedback. Do not treat this as a mandatory action after every small edit.
